title: A Taxi Driver
tmdbOverview: May, 1980. Man-seob is a taxi driver in Seoul who lives from hand to mouth, raising his young daughter alone. One day, he hears that there is a foreigner who will pay big money for a drive down to Gwangju city. Not knowing that he’s a German journalist with a hidden agenda, Man-seob takes the job.
synopsis: A Taxi Driver (2017) is a drama, history and k-drama film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.9 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a M certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
